name: pyright
description: Run pyright on a Python codebase and fix the errors it finds. Supports optional strictness override (basic/standard/strict), persisting the level to config, progressive ratcheting, fix-intent selection (silence/improve/bugs-only), an end-of-run list of suggested type improvements, active TypedDict/Pydantic extraction from opaque dict[str, Any] under --intent improve, and a handoff pointer to /harness:reasoning-gaps.
